description_long: This object consists of three adjacent rectangular grave plots, each with a raised stone base and an upright headstone at one end. The headstones are tall, flat slabs with a prominent black Latin cross engraved or inlaid on the front face. The stone surfaces have a weathered, gray texture, suggesting concrete or granite construction. The bases are slightly elevated above ground level, with clean, angular edges and a uniform, block-like appearance. There are no visible inscriptions or decorative elements aside from the crosses. The overall arrangement is orderly and somber, typical of a modern urban cemetery.
description: A set of three gray stone graves with upright headstones, each featuring a black Latin cross, arranged side by side in a neat row.
description_view_0: Front view showing three grave plots with upright headstones, each displaying a black Latin cross.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the headstones and the layered, rectangular bases of the graves.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain backs of the headstones and the uniform, blocky bases.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the depth and structure of the grave bases.
